## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Enter task '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, paste browser console errors or Python terminal output.

## Environment
- **OS:** [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **AI Provider:** [e.g. Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic]
- **Running on:** [Local / Cloud Run]
- **Python version:** [e.g. 3.12]
